name: Duration
goal: Format a static duration in seconds (or milliseconds) as a compact or long human-readable string.
description: Pure formatter for a fixed elapsed time — e.g. 'this task took 3725 seconds → 1h 2m'. Auto-picks the most significant units (days, hours, minutes, seconds) up to a cap (default 2). The compact format renders '1h 2m 5s'; the long format renders '1 hour 2 minutes 5 seconds' with correct plural agreement. Sub-second durations supplied via the ms attribute are formatted as a millisecond string. No live ticking — for a counting timer see ce-countdown, for relative age see ce-relative-time.

props.name: ms
props.description: Duration in milliseconds; overrides seconds when set and renders a sub-second unit when < 1000.

props.name: format
props.description: Compact ('1h 2m 5s') or long ('1 hour 2 minutes 5 seconds') word form.

props.name: units
props.description: Maximum number of significant units to render.
